allow: Bash(mysql -u root cms_db2 -e "SELECT 'users' t, COUNT\(*\) n FROM users; SELECT 'lms_courses' t, COUNT\(*\) n FROM lms_courses; SELECT 'lms_enrollments' t, COUNT\(*\) n FROM lms_enrollments; SELECT 'lms_lessons' t, COUNT\(*\) n FROM lms_lessons; SELECT 'lms_categories' t, COUNT\(*\) n FROM lms_categories; SELECT 'orders' t, COUNT\(*\) n FROM orders; SELECT 'admission_requests' t, COUNT\(*\) n FROM admission_requests;")
